prompt: Real on-model portrait photograph, natural window light, shot on a mirrorless camera with shallow depth of field. A relaxed Texas builder in their late twenties stands against a warm paper white studio wall, hands in pocket, easy confident smile. They wear a heavyweight black hoodie. Across the chest, a clean print: the orange AITX open-arms mark in AITX orange #ff4201, with small text beneath reading exactly 'better in person'. On the left sleeve near the cuff, a small embroidered lockup 'AITX x NVIDIA', AITX in orange and the NVIDIA wordmark in NVIDIA green #76b900. Premium streetwear feel, authentic skin texture, soft shadows, editorial but warm, true colors, high resolution.
